name: instant-api — admin defense-in-depth
description: Access patterns and brute-force probe signal for the admin surface (PR #66+ era). Source: audit_log records with audit_kind = 'admin.access' emitted by the admin allowlist middleware, plus Transaction events on ADMIN_PATH_PREFIX routes. Pairs with the admin-allowlist-breach + admin-probe-404-rate alerts.

pages.name: Admin
pages.description: Admin allowlist enforcement + brute-force probe signal

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'admin.access' FACET path_suffix TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 24 hours ago LIMIT 20
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'admin.access' FACET user_email SINCE 24 hours ago LIMIT 25
SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND request.uri LIKE '/admin/%' AND httpResponseCode LIKE '4%' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'hits', latest(timestamp) AS 'last seen' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'admin.access' FACET user_email, path_suffix SINCE 24 hours ago LIMIT 50
